text: Trump: Iran wants to make a deal... they are willing to do things today they weren't willing to do 2 months ago.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗想要达成协议……他们今天愿意做的事情是两个月前他们不愿意做的。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated: "Since October 7, we have fundamentally changed the balance of power in Lebanon. We activated the pagers, we eliminated the huge stockpile of 150,000 rockets and missiles that Nasrallah had prepared to destroy the cities of Israel. We eliminated Nasrallah, and this balance changed in such a way that we started receiving calls from Lebanon in the last month to hold peace talks directly between us, which had not happened in over 40 years." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示：“自10月7日以来，我们从根本上改变了黎巴嫩的力量平衡。我们启动了寻呼机，消除了纳斯鲁拉为摧毁以色列城市而准备的15万枚火箭弹和导弹的巨大库存。我们消除了纳斯鲁拉，这种平衡发生了变化，以至于我们在过去一个月里开始接到来自黎巴嫩的电话，要求在我们之间直接进行和平谈判，这在过去40多年里从未发生过。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: The Pope has to understand: Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon.
text_zh: 特朗普：教皇必须明白：伊朗不能拥有核武器。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The IDF announced that it has used the new “Ro’em” automatic howitzer in combat for the first time, allegedly striking Hezbollah rocket and anti‑tank missile launchers in southern Lebanon. The truck‑mounted system requires only three crew members (down from eight), reduces response time to under one minute, and offers longer range, higher rate of fire, and simultaneous‑impact capability. The IDF described the operational debut as a historic milestone after 50 years of artillery modernisation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布首次在战斗中使用新型“Ro’em”自动榴弹炮，据称打击了黎巴嫩南部的真主党火箭弹和反坦克导弹发射器。这种卡车搭载的系统仅需三名机组人员（此前为八名），将响应时间缩短至一分钟以内，并提供更远的射程、更高的射速和同时打击能力。以色列国防军将此次作战首秀描述为50年火炮现代化后的一个历史性里程碑。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The US Navy amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli seen today south west of the Gulf of Oman. 21.18N 60.93E @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国海军两栖攻击舰“的黎波里”号今天出现在阿曼湾西南部。北纬21.18度，东经60.93度 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 i24NEWS: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun told U.S. officials, including Secretary of State Marco Rubio, that a phone call between leaders is only meaningful when there is significant progress on the ground. “Without real negotiations, and especially without a ceasefire, I will not hold a call with Netanyahu at this time,” he said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 i24NEWS：黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩告诉包括国务卿马尔科·卢比奥在内的美国官员，只有在地面取得重大进展时，领导人之间的通话才有意义。“如果没有真正的谈判，特别是没有停火，我目前不会与内塔尼亚胡通话，”他说。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸 Kan: The Israel‑Lebanon ceasefire will take effect at midnight. Trump pressured Netanyahu for an immediate truce; in return, Netanyahu insisted that Israeli ground forces remain in the new security zone in southern Lebanon. It is expected to last…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Hezbollah MP Ibrahim al‑Moussawi called the ceasefire an achievement for Lebanon, citing the group’s “legendary steadfastness” and Iran’s “supreme efforts”. Bloc head Ali Fayyad warned that continued Israeli strikes or targeted killings in southern Lebanon would be serious violations, and that any IDF presence on Lebanese land is aggression giving the right to resist. He demanded full withdrawal, an end to strikes, and the return of displaced residents, and warned that direct talks with Israel could lead to “internal collision”. Lebanese Parliamentary Speaker Nabih Berri urged displaced residents not to rush back until the ceasefire’s status is clear. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸 Kan：以色列与黎巴嫩的停火协议将于午夜生效。特朗普向内塔尼亚胡施压要求立即休战；作为交换，内塔尼亚胡坚持要求以色列地面部队留在黎巴嫩南部的新安全区。预计将持续……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 真主党议员易卜拉欣·穆萨维称停火是黎巴嫩的成就，并援引该组织的“传奇坚定性”和伊朗的“最高努力”。议会集团负责人阿里·法亚德警告称，以色列在黎巴嫩南部的持续打击或定点清除将是严重违规行为，任何以色列国防军在黎巴嫩土地上的存在都是赋予抵抗权利的侵略行为。他要求全面撤军、停止打击并让流离失所的居民返回，并警告称与以色列的直接谈判可能导致“内部冲突”。黎巴嫩议会议长纳比·贝里敦促流离失所的居民在停火状态明确之前不要急于返回。 @wfwitness

text: 🇾🇪 🇾🇪 "The tyranny of Trump, who is a puppet in the hands of Zionism, has reached an extremely bad level. Sayyed Abdul-Malik al-Houthi: Netanyahu says the American administration provides him with reports of its work. Behind that is the Zionist lobby. Trump, and the entire system in America, is completely subject to the Jewish Zionist lobby. "This situation threatens the security and stability of the region, with its impacts at the global level." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇾🇪 🇾🇪 “特朗普作为犹太复国主义手中的傀儡，其暴政已经达到了极其恶劣的程度。赛义德·阿卜杜勒-马利克·胡塞：内塔尼亚胡说美国政府向他提供其工作报告。其背后是犹太复国主义游说团体。特朗普以及整个美国体系完全受制于犹太复国主义游说团体。这种情况威胁着该地区的安全与稳定，并对全球层面产生影响。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese media report that over 60 southern Lebanon towns came under dozens of Israeli airstrikes and artillery fire in the past 4 hours. An Israeli airstrike hit a building in Ghaziyeh, as Lebanese media reported additional IDF strikes across several areas of southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044831527670788602/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：黎巴嫩媒体报道称，过去4小时内，黎巴嫩南部60多个城镇遭到数十次以色列空袭和炮火袭击。以色列空袭了加齐耶（Ghaziyeh）的一栋建筑，黎巴嫩媒体报道称以色列国防军在黎巴嫩南部多个地区进行了更多打击。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044831527670788602/video/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @alexplitsas : 🧵 🚨 Africa Problem Just returned from a trip to Africa where I was able to witness the success of USAFRICOM efforts to train and integrate the competing factions that is part of a roadmap for security and stability necessary to enable foreign direct investment and free elections tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @alexplitsas：🧵 🚨 非洲问题 刚从非洲旅行回来，我亲眼见证了美国非洲司令部（USAFRICOM）在培训和整合相互竞争的派系方面取得的成功，这是实现安全与稳定路线图的一部分，而这对于实现外国直接投资和自由选举是必要的。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 U.S. pressure on Israel in an effort to secure a deal with Iran has reportedly produced results, with Donald Trump announcing that Israel and Lebanon have reached a 10-day ceasefire. 🔹 While Lebanon’s role may seem unexpected, the context is key: Iran had conditioned progress in talks with the U.S. on a ceasefire in Lebanon — specifically a halt to Israeli strikes on Hezbollah. Since Israel cannot formally negotiate with Hezbollah, talks were conducted indirectly through U.S. mediation with Lebanon, resulting in the temporary ceasefire. 🔹 Israeli media report that government ministers were frustrated, as Trump announced the ceasefire before it was formally discussed by Israel’s cabinet. 🔹 Meanwhile, Pakistan’s army chief, who has played an active mediating role in U.S.–Iran talks, traveled from Tehran to Washington following recent discussions, where further details of a potential agreement are expected to be addressed. 🔹 It appears Trump is pushing hard to reach a deal with Iran, potentially ahead of an upcoming visit to China, even applying pressure on Israel to do so. 🔹 The current interim ceasefire deadline with Iran expires on April 22, and several major outlets suggest it may be extended for a few more weeks. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 据报道，美国为确保与伊朗达成协议而对以色列施加的压力已产生结果，唐纳德·特朗普宣布以色列和黎巴嫩已达成10天停火协议。🔹 虽然黎巴嫩的角色看起来出人意料，但背景是关键：伊朗将与美国谈判的进展以黎巴嫩停火为条件——具体来说是停止以色列对真主党的打击。由于以色列无法与真主党正式谈判，谈判是通过美国调解黎巴嫩间接进行的，从而达成了临时停火。🔹 以色列媒体报道称，政府部长们感到沮丧，因为特朗普在以色列内阁正式讨论之前就宣布了停火。🔹 与此同时，在美伊谈判中发挥积极调解作用的巴基斯坦陆军参谋长在最近的讨论后从德黑兰前往华盛顿，预计将在那里处理潜在协议的更多细节。🔹 看来特朗普正在努力与伊朗达成协议，可能是在即将访问中国之前，甚至为此向以色列施压。🔹 目前与伊朗的临时停火截止日期为4月22日，几家主要媒体建议可能会再延长几周。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: WarMonitor The Israeli security cabinet did not approve the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire before Trump announced it. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044833534368444711/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 以色列安全内阁在特朗普宣布之前并未批准以黎停火协议。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044833534368444711/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel CRAZY FOOTAGE 🔴 REPORT FROM LEBANON: This Hezbollah fighter reportedly received a warning. It is possible the IDF contacted him to inform him he was a target and about to be struck. He exited the car to avoid endangering others, ran into a field, and positioned himself so the drone would hit him alone. In many cases, the IDF has called targets to leave areas with civilians. They leave to an area alone, then drone targets them. This has been reported for multiple cases. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：疯狂的画面 🔴 来自黎巴嫩的报道：据报道，这名真主党战士收到了一条警告。以色列国防军可能联系了他，通知他他是一个目标，即将被打击。他为了避免危及他人而下车，跑进田野，并调整位置，以便无人机只击中他一人。在许多情况下，以色列国防军曾呼吁目标离开平民区。他们离开到一个单独的区域，然后无人机瞄准他们。这在多个案例中都有报道。推文

text: Open Source Intel Details emerging on today’s Lebanon-Israel diplomacy: • Marco Rubio held a follow-up call with Joseph Aoun after their Tuesday meeting. • After speaking with Aoun, Rubio reportedly sought approval from Donald Trump for a direct Trump-Aoun call. • Lebanon’s ambassador in Washington was then informed that an immediate call was being arranged. • During the call, Trump reportedly praised Aoun as “a great leader.” Aoun requested a ceasefire, and Trump replied: “I will get it for you.” • Trump later spoke with Benjamin Netanyahu and reportedly secured a 10-day ceasefire, with negotiations expected to follow. • Sources say Rubio is deeply engaged in the diplomatic track. @hibanasr tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：关于今天黎巴嫩-以色列外交的细节浮出水面：• 马可·卢比奥在周二会面后与约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）进行了后续通话。• 与奥恩交谈后，据报道卢比奥寻求唐纳德·特朗普批准进行特朗普与奥恩的直接通话。• 黎巴嫩驻华盛顿大使随后被告知正在安排一次紧急通话。• 在通话中，据报道特朗普称赞奥恩是“一位伟大的领导人”。奥恩请求停火，特朗普回答说：“我会为你争取到。”• 特朗普随后与本雅明·内塔尼亚胡交谈，据报道达成了10天停火协议，预计随后将进行谈判。• 消息人士称，卢比奥深度参与了外交轨道。@hibanasr 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanon’s Health Ministry reports 7 killed and 33 wounded in an IDF strike on Al Ghazia village near Sidon An Israeli airstrike hit a building in Ghaziyeh, as Lebanese media reported additional IDF strikes across several areas of southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044831527670788602/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：黎巴嫩卫生部报告称，以色列国防军对西顿附近的加齐亚（Al Ghazia）村的袭击造成7人死亡，33人受伤。以色列空袭了加齐耶的一栋建筑，黎巴嫩媒体报道称以色列国防军在黎巴嫩南部多个地区进行了更多打击。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044831527670788602/video/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel An Israeli airstrike hit a building in Ghaziyeh, as Lebanese media reported additional IDF strikes across several areas of southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044831527670788602/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel The U.S. has handed over its last base in Syria to the Syrian Army and fully withdrawn its forces from the country after 11 years. The only remaining U.S. military presence will be a small security detail at the embassy in Damascus. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044829840524603899/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：美国已将其在叙利亚的最后一个基地移交给叙利亚军队，并在11年后完全从该国撤出其部队。唯一剩下的美国军事存在将是大马士革大使馆的一小支安全分队。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044829840524603899/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 Three supertankers were seen today being loaded with oil at the terminals of Kharg island. Despite the ongoing US naval blockade, Iran continues to load ships. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2044829686220415327/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 今天在哈尔格岛（Kharg island）的码头看到三艘超级油轮正在装载石油。尽管美国实施了持续的海上封锁，伊朗仍在继续装载船只。https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2044829686220415327/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel 😂 😂 😂 Once Lebanon and Israel sign a Peace deal. they will say: - Without the steadfastness of the resistance and the help of Iran, there would have been no peace :) -  𝓂𝒶𝓇𝒾𝑜 🇱🇧 🇬🇧 🇦🇪 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：😂 😂 😂 一旦黎巴嫩和以色列签署和平协议，他们会说：- 没有抵抗力量的坚定和伊朗的帮助，就不会有和平 :) -  𝓂𝒶𝓇𝒾𝑜 🇱🇧 🇬🇧 🇦🇪 推文

text: WarTranslated Slovakia is prepared to block the adoption of the European Union's 20th sanctions package against Russia until it receives guarantees regarding the restoration of the "Druzhba" pipeline's operation, stated the country's Foreign Minister Juraj Blanár. At the same time, Slovakia does not object to unblocking a 90-billion-euro loan for Ukraine. https://e.dennikn.sk/minuta/5279830 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 斯洛伐克外交部长尤拉伊·布拉纳尔（Juraj Blanár）表示，斯洛伐克准备阻止欧盟通过对俄罗斯的第20轮制裁方案，直到获得有关恢复“友谊”（Druzhba）输油管道运营的保证。同时，斯洛伐克不反对为乌克兰解冻900亿欧元的贷款。https://e.dennikn.sk/minuta/5279830 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah MP Ali Fayyad to Al Jazeera: "The ceasefire must be full and comprehensive. Continued strikes on targets in southern Lebanon and assassinations would be a blatant violation of the agreement." He claimed any Israeli presence on Lebanese soil "grants the people the right to resistance," called the next phase "complex and full of challenges," and demanded a full Israeli withdrawal and return of displaced persons. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：真主党议员阿里·法耶德（Ali Fayyad）对半岛电视台表示：“停火必须是全面和彻底的。继续对黎巴嫩南部的目标进行打击和暗杀将是对协议的公然违反。”他声称任何以色列在黎巴嫩领土上的存在“赋予了人民抵抗的权利”，称下一阶段“复杂且充满挑战”，并要求以色列全面撤军和流离失所者返回。推文

text: Open Source Intel Channel 13: Israeli Officials: The ceasefire in Lebanon was imposed on Israel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：第13频道：以色列官员：黎巴嫩停火协议是强加给以色列的。推文

text: Open Source Intel Ceasefire terms in Lebanon at this stage: • IDF forces will remain along the “anti-tank line” and will not withdraw from the key terrain they have captured so far in southern Lebanon • If a threat from Hezbollah is identified, or operatives endanger IDF forces or nearby communities, the IDF is authorized to act and remove the threat, similar to the terms of the November 2024 ceasefire Hezbollah will definitely not be thrilled. I would like to hear the rules of this new imposed ceasefire. Can Hezbollah have any movement? Does Israel need to give up some gains in southern Lebanon? - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：现阶段黎巴嫩停火条款：• 以色列国防军部队将留在“反坦克线”沿线，不会从他们迄今为止在黎巴嫩南部占领的关键地形撤出 • 如果发现来自真主党的威胁，或者武装人员危及以色列国防军部队或附近社区，以色列国防军有权采取行动消除威胁，类似于2024年11月停火协议的条款。真主党肯定不会高兴。我想听听这个新强加的停火协议的规则。真主党可以有任何行动吗？以色列需要放弃在黎巴嫩南部的一些收益吗？ - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel The House voted 220–207 to block President Trump from deporting 350,000 Haitians. The measure now moves to the Senate. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044827712343155015/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：众议院以220票对207票投票阻止特朗普总统驱逐35万海地人。该措施现已提交参议院。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044827712343155015/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Israeli government ministers were “outraged” by today’s announced ceasefire with Lebanon, which was revealed on TruthSocial by U.S. President Donald J. Trump who gave Israel’s consent to the ceasefire before it could be approved by the Israeli Security Cabinet, according to i24NEWS. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据i24NEWS报道，以色列政府部长们对今天宣布的与黎巴嫩的停火协议感到“愤怒”，该协议由美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普在TruthSocial上披露，他在以色列安全内阁批准之前就给予了以色列同意。推文

text: Open Source Intel All you need to do is keep the naval blockade on Iran for 4 weeks, and the IRGC can’t pay salaries. Now is not the time to show weakness to the IRGC. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：你所要做的就是对伊朗保持海上封锁4周，伊斯兰革命卫队就发不出工资了。现在不是向伊斯兰革命卫队表现出软弱的时候。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇸🇾 Three Syrian army personnel were killed and others wounded, in addition to material damage, by the explosion of war remnants in the town of Qarfa. These remnants had previously been dismantled from various locations in Daraa Governorate. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇸🇾 The ammunition depot was inside the 40th Division military base. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇸🇾 在卡尔法（Qarfa）镇，战争遗留物爆炸导致三名叙利亚军人死亡，另有多人受伤，并造成物质损失。这些遗留物此前已从德拉省（Daraa Governorate）的各个地点拆除。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇸🇾 弹药库位于第40师军事基地内。@wfwitness

text: US–Iran peace talks could take about six months, according to Gulf and European officials. They’re pushing to extend the current ceasefire during that time and reopen the Strait of Hormuz quickly to restore energy supplies. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 据海湾和欧洲官员称，美伊和平谈判可能需要大约六个月的时间。他们正在推动在此期间延长目前的停火协议，并迅速重新开放霍尔木兹海峡以恢复能源供应。来源：彭博社

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸 Israel has agreed to a ceasefire in Lebanon at U.S. President Trump’s request, Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu told ministers. No cabinet vote was held; ministers learned of the truce from Trump’s post. The ceasefire follows the November 2024…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan: The Israel‑Lebanon ceasefire will take effect at midnight. Trump pressured Netanyahu for an immediate truce; in return, Netanyahu insisted that Israeli ground forces remain in the new security zone in southern Lebanon. It is expected to last more than ten days. For the first time, Israel will enter humanitarian aid to three Christian villages in southern Lebanon – Rmeish, Dibl and Ain Ibl near Bint Jbeil. Trucks from the evangelical Samaritan’s Purse were checked by Israeli security and will be delivered under IDF protection. Israel had previously allowed Druze and Christian villagers to stay after they pledged not to allow Hezbollah activity. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡告诉部长们，应美国总统特朗普的要求，以色列已同意在黎巴嫩停火。没有举行内阁投票；部长们从特朗普的帖子中得知了休战消息。停火是在2024年11月之后……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan：以黎停火将于午夜生效。特朗普向内塔尼亚胡施压要求立即休战；作为回报，内塔尼亚胡坚持要求以色列地面部队留在黎巴嫩南部的新安全区。预计将持续十天以上。以色列将首次向黎巴嫩南部的三个基督教村庄——Rmeish、Dibl和Bint Jbeil附近的Ain Ibl——运送人道主义援助。来自福音派撒玛利亚救援会（Samaritan’s Purse）的卡车经过了以色列安全检查，并将在以色列国防军的保护下交付。以色列此前曾允许德鲁兹和基督教村民在承诺不允许真主党活动后留下来。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kan : Lebanese President Joseph Aoun refused to speak with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu because the step was “too fast." The source said such a conversation should take place in the final stages of negotiations, not before they have begun. Aoun fears that Hezbollah would “hold it against him” and destabilise his rule, especially after the group has already been inflamed by this week’s historic meeting between Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors in Washington. Aoun reportedly briefed the Sunni prime minister, the Shia parliament speaker and the Druze leader on his refusal. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kan：黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩拒绝与以色列总理内塔尼亚胡通话，因为这一举动“太快了”。消息人士称，此类对话应在谈判最后阶段进行，而不是在谈判开始之前。奥恩担心真主党会“以此为借口”针对他并破坏其统治，特别是在该组织因本周以色列和黎巴嫩大使在华盛顿的历史性会晤而感到愤怒之后。据报道，奥恩已向逊尼派总理、什叶派议长和德鲁兹派领导人通报了他的拒绝决定。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺Ukrainian drones struck the oil storge facility at the Tuapse oil refinery in Russia's Krasnodar Krai region early this Thursday morning. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 The oil terminal of Tuapse has burned through the day following an Ukrainian drone attack. Black smoke can be seen pushed 150km south over the Black Sea. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺周四清晨，乌克兰无人机袭击了俄罗斯克拉斯诺达尔边疆区图阿普谢炼油厂的储油设施。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 在乌克兰无人机袭击后，图阿普谢石油码头燃烧了一整天。可以看到黑烟向南飘散至150公里外的黑海上方。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 Three Syrian army personnel were killed and others wounded, in addition to material damage, by the explosion of war remnants in the town of Qarfa. These remnants had previously been dismantled from various locations in Daraa Governorate. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 三名叙利亚军队人员在卡尔法镇因战争遗留爆炸物爆炸而丧生，另有多人受伤，并造成物质损失。这些遗留物此前是从德拉省的各个地点拆除的。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: Gulf and European officials believe a comprehensive deal between the United States and Iran could take six months to finalize. There is growing pressure to extend the current ceasefire to allow time for negotiations to progress and avoid a return to conflict. Regional leaders are also urging the immediate reopening of the Strait of Hormuz to stabilise global energy flows, warning that prolonged disruption could trigger further spikes in oil prices and even contribute to a global food crisis if the situation continues. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 彭博社：海湾和欧洲官员认为，美国和伊朗之间的全面协议可能需要六个月才能最终敲定。目前要求延长现有停火协议的压力越来越大，以便为谈判取得进展争取时间，并避免冲突重演。地区领导人还敦促立即重新开放霍尔木兹海峡以稳定全球能源流动，并警告称，如果局势持续下去，长期的中断可能会引发油价进一步飙升，甚至导致全球粮食危机。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇷 Three supertankers were seen today being loaded with oil at the terminals of Kharg island. Despite the ongoing US naval blockade, Iran continues to load ships. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇷 今天看到三艘超级油轮在哈尔克岛码头装载石油。尽管美国海军实施了封锁，伊朗仍在继续装载船只。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧 BREAKING: Trump announces a 10-day ceasefire between Lebanon and Israel beginning at 5 PM EST, following conversations with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Trump states the two leaders met for the first…" The last time USA imposed a ceasefire in Lebanon, infamous traitor Jonathan Pollard said nukes should fly. Six months ago, Jonathan Pollard explained what he thinks Israel should do when Washington imposes a ceasefire: threaten to use nuclear weapons, and be ready to follow through. Pollard recounted October 1973, when Henry Kissinger cut off arms during the Yom Kippur War to extract concessions. Israel parked an A4 Skyhawk at Tel Nof airbase with unconventional weapons under its wings and told Washington to "take a good look." The airlifts restarted the next day. When asked if Israel should make the same threat now, Pollard said: "Absolutely, except this time, I want us to go forward with it if necessary." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧 快讯：特朗普宣布，在与黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩和以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡通话后，黎巴嫩和以色列之间将于美国东部时间下午5点开始为期10天的停火。特朗普表示，两位领导人会面了……” 上次美国在黎巴嫩实施停火时，臭名昭著的叛徒乔纳森·波拉德曾称应该动用核武器。六个月前，乔纳森·波拉德解释了他认为当华盛顿强加停火时以色列应该怎么做：威胁使用核武器，并准备付诸行动。波拉德讲述了1973年10月的情况，当时亨利·基辛格在赎罪日战争期间切断了武器供应以获取让步。以色列在特尔诺夫空军基地停放了一架机翼下挂载非常规武器的A4天鹰攻击机，并告诉华盛顿“好好看看”。空运第二天就恢复了。当被问及以色列现在是否应该发出同样的威胁时，波拉德说：“绝对应该，只是这一次，如果必要的话，我希望我们真的付诸行动。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 🇳🇱 Zelensky’s interpreter was caught swearing into a live mic after a press conference with the Dutch prime minister. Via: Margarita Simonyan 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 🇳🇱 泽连斯基的翻译在与荷兰首相举行新闻发布会后，在直播麦克风前被抓到爆粗口。来源：玛格丽塔·西蒙尼扬 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 After several days of sustained U.S. pressure on Israel to facilitate a broader agreement with Iran, it appears Washington has achieved a result. Today, Donald Trump announced that Israel and Lebanon have reached a 10-day ceasefire. At first glance, Lebanon’s role may seem unexpected, but the context matters. As part of negotiations with the United States, Iran demanded a ceasefire in Lebanon — effectively requiring Israel to halt its strikes against Hezbollah. However, Israel cannot formally sign an agreement with Hezbollah, which it designates as a terrorist organization. As a workaround, and with U.S. mediation, formal negotiations were conducted between Israel and Lebanon, ultimately resulting in this temporary 10-day ceasefire arrangement. At the same time, according to Israeli media reports, government ministers are outraged that Trump publicly announced the ceasefire before it had been reviewed and approved by Israel’s security cabinet. It is also worth noting that Pakistan’s Chief of Army Staff, who has been actively involved in mediating U.S.–Iran talks, traveled to Tehran yesterday and is now en route to Washington. This likely signals ongoing discussions and exchanges regarding the expected agreement. Overall, Trump appears determined to secure a deal with Iran at almost any cost, particularly ahead of his planned visit to China in early May. In pursuit of this objective, he has not hesitated to apply pressure on Israel. For reference, the current interim ceasefire period with Iran is set to expire on April 22. Multiple influential media outlets suggest that Trump is likely to extend it by several more weeks. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 在美国持续数日向以色列施压以促成其与伊朗达成更广泛协议后，华盛顿似乎取得了成果。今天，唐纳德·特朗普宣布以色列和黎巴嫩已达成一项为期10天的停火协议。乍一看，黎巴嫩的角色可能显得出人意料，但背景很重要。作为与美国谈判的一部分，伊朗要求黎巴嫩停火——实际上是要求以色列停止对真主党的打击。然而，以色列无法正式与被其定性为恐怖组织的真主党签署协议。作为一种变通办法，并在美国的调解下，以色列和黎巴嫩之间进行了正式谈判，最终达成了这项为期10天的临时停火安排。与此同时，据以色列媒体报道，政府部长们对特朗普在停火协议未经以色列安全内阁审查和批准之前就公开宣布感到愤怒。同样值得注意的是，一直积极参与调解美伊会谈的巴基斯坦陆军参谋长昨天前往德黑兰，目前正在前往华盛顿的途中。这很可能预示着有关预期协议的持续讨论和交流。总的来说，特朗普似乎决心不惜一切代价与伊朗达成协议，特别是在他计划于5月初访问中国之前。为了实现这一目标，他不惜向以色列施压。作为参考，目前与伊朗的临时停火期定于4月22日结束。多家有影响力的媒体暗示，特朗普很可能会将其延长数周。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @glcarlstrom : "As many as 12m jobs, nearly half of Iran's workforce, are at risk from furloughs or layoffs... the disruption to the steel industry alone threatens more than 5.5m jobs, along with another 1.2m jobs at risk in petrochemical and pharmaceuticals. The sectors hit hardest by US and Israeli airstrikes represent the core pillars of employment and production." https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/irans-war-shattered-economy-means-it-has-an-urgent-reason-to-negotiate-43937f36?mod=middle-east_news_article_pos2 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @glcarlstrom : “多达1200万个工作岗位，即伊朗近一半的劳动力，正面临休假或裁员的风险……仅钢铁行业的动荡就威胁到超过550万个工作岗位，石化和制药行业还有120万个工作岗位面临风险。受美国和以色列空袭打击最严重的行业代表了就业和生产的核心支柱。” https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/irans-war-shattered-economy-means-it-has-an-urgent-reason-to-negotiate-43937f36?mod=middle-east_news_article_pos2 推文

text: OSINTdefender Post made by Pope Leo XIV, the Head of the Catholic Church, minutes after this statement by U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth, in which he stated while in Cameroon: “Woe to those who manipulate religion and the very name of God for their own military, economic, and political gain, dragging that which is sacred into darkness and filth.” Speaking during today’s Pentagon press conference, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth compared the American media and journalists that criticize President Trump, with the Pharisees, a Jewish sect in the first century that clashed and denied Jesus Christ. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044823433930797311/video/1 - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯发表声明几分钟后，天主教会领袖教皇利奥十四世发布了帖子。赫格塞斯在喀麦隆时表示：“祸哉那些为了自己的军事、经济和政治利益而操纵宗教和上帝之名，将神圣之物拖入黑暗和污秽中的人。”在今天的五角大楼新闻发布会上，国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯将批评特朗普总统的美国媒体和记者比作法利赛人，这是一个在公元一世纪与耶稣基督发生冲突并否认他的犹太教派。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044823433930797311/video/1 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: Open Source Intel David Azulai, head of the Metula Council (Northern Israel) and a member of Yisrael Beiteinu, responding to the ceasefire in the north: “Northern residents feel betrayed once again today. That’s how we felt during ‘Swords of Iron,’ and that’s how we feel now. The fact that the President of the United States is the one announcing the ceasefire only highlights how disconnected Israel’s prime minister is from the public and from the reality of the northern residents.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 梅图拉委员会（以色列北部）负责人、以色列是我们的家园党成员大卫·阿祖莱在回应北部停火时表示：“北部居民今天再次感到被背叛了。我们在‘铁剑’行动期间就是这种感觉，现在也是这种感觉。美国总统亲自宣布停火这一事实，只会凸显以色列总理与公众以及北部居民的现实是多么脱节。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam: He welcomes President Trump’s ceasefire announcement, calling it a central Lebanese demand pursued since the first day of the war and a primary objective in their meeting in Washington on Tuesday. He thanked regional and international efforts, especially the U.S., France, the European Union, Saudi Arabia, and Egypt, as well as Qatar and Jordan. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆：他欢迎特朗普总统的停火声明，称这是黎巴嫩自战争第一天起就追求的核心要求，也是他们周二在华盛顿会晤的主要目标。他感谢了区域和国际社会的努力，特别是美国、法国、欧盟、沙特阿拉伯和埃及，以及卡塔尔和约旦。推文

text: WarMonitor A federal judge has scaled back Trump’s White House ballroom plans, allowing construction to proceed on a military-approved underground section while blocking the ballroom itself. “National security is not a blank check to proceed with otherwise unlawful activity.” https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044825110696108098/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一名联邦法官缩减了特朗普的白宫宴会厅计划，允许在军事批准的地下部分进行施工，但阻止了宴会厅本身的建设。“国家安全不是进行非法活动的空白支票。” https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044825110696108098/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu to ministers: President Trump asked me for a ceasefire, and I agreed to his request. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044824849458118898/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 内塔尼亚胡对部长们说：特朗普总统要求我停火，我同意了他的请求。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044824849458118898/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Lebanese MP from Hezbollah Hassan Fadlallah told Lebanon’s Al Mayadeen: “We learned today from the Iranian ambassador in Beirut that Iranian efforts led to a comprehensive ceasefire in Lebanon. The American side committed to informing the Israeli prime minister of this decision, as well as conveying it to the president of Lebanon.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 来自真主党的黎巴嫩议员哈桑·法德拉拉告诉黎巴嫩广场电视台：“我们今天从伊朗驻贝鲁特大使那里得知，伊朗的努力促成了黎巴嫩的全面停火。美方承诺将此决定通知以色列总理，并将其传达给黎巴嫩总统。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu to ministers: We will remain in the security zone during the ceasefire. Wherever we are, we stay. I would like to hear the rules of this new imposed ceasefire. Can Hezbollah have any movement? Does Israel need to give up some gains in southern Lebanon? - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 内塔尼亚胡对部长们说：停火期间我们将留在安全区。我们在哪里，就留在哪里。我想听听这个新强加的停火协议的规则。真主党可以有任何行动吗？以色列需要放弃在黎巴嫩南部的一些成果吗？ - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM: This morning, Adm. Brad Cooper, CENTCOM commander, addressed media at the Pentagon during a briefing on the blockade against ships attempting to enter or exit Iranian ports. He highlighted his most recent trip to the Middle East where he visited with U.S. service members and engaged regional allies and partners. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 中央司令部：今天上午，中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀海军上将在五角大楼举行的新闻发布会上向媒体发表讲话，介绍了针对试图进出伊朗港口的船只的封锁情况。他强调了他最近的中东之行，在那里他访问了美国军人并与区域盟友和伙伴进行了接触。推文

text: Open Source Intel Moshe Davidovich, head of the Mateh Asher Regional Council and chairman of the Confrontation Line Forum (Northern Israel border communities) responding to President Trump’s ceasefire announcement: “Agreements are signed in suits in Washington, but the price is paid here in blood, in destroyed homes, and in shattered communities in Mateh Asher and along the confrontation line. A ‘ceasefire’ that does not include lethal enforcement against Hezbollah for every violation, and a terror free security zone up to the Litani, is not a diplomatic achievement, it is a sentence to wait for the next massacre. Northern residents are not extras in an international public relations show.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 阿舍尔地区委员会负责人、对抗线论坛（以色列北部边境社区）主席摩西·大卫维奇在回应特朗普总统的停火声明时表示：“协议是在华盛顿穿着西装签署的，但代价是在这里用鲜血、被毁的家园以及阿舍尔和对抗线上破碎的社区来支付的。一项不包括对真主党每次违规行为进行致命执法，以及在利塔尼河前建立无恐怖分子安全区的‘停火’，不是外交成就，而是等待下一次大屠杀的判决。北部居民不是国际公关秀中的临时演员。”推文

text: OSINTdefender Speaking during today’s Pentagon press conference, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth compared the American media and journalists that criticize President Trump, with the Pharisees, a Jewish sect in the first century that clashed and denied Jesus Christ. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044823433930797311/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在今天的五角大楼新闻发布会上，国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯将批评特朗普总统的美国媒体和记者比作法利赛人，这是一个在公元一世纪与耶稣基督发生冲突并否认他的犹太教派。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044823433930797311/video/1 推文
